title: DeepCopilot Provider Definition
description: Declarative spec for a chat-completion provider. Drop this file in src/providers/ (built-in) or in the user-configured providersDir to register a new vendor.

id.description: Unique provider identifier. Used in settings, routing, and the wire protocol.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI.

baseUrl.description: Default API base URL. User-set apiBaseUrl overrides this.

apiKeyUrl.description: URL where the user can obtain an API key. Shown as a help link in settings.

protocol.description: Wire protocol. 'openai' routes to the OpenAI-compatible client; 'anthropic' routes to the native Anthropic SDK.

defaultModel.description: Model id used when no explicit override matches this provider.

subAgentModel.description: Optional override used by spawn_agent. Falls back to defaultModel.

noApiKey.description: When true, the provider does not require an API key (e.g. local LLM servers).

quirks.description: Per-provider behavior flags consumed by the request layer.

streamOptions.description: Send `stream_options.include_usage: true`. OpenAI/DeepSeek support; some compat servers don't.

parallelTools.description: Send `parallel_tool_calls: true`. Anthropic-compat shims often reject this.

useMaxCompletionTokens.description: Use `max_completion_tokens` instead of `max_tokens`. Required for OpenAI GPT-5 series.

testConnectionMaxTokens.description: Override the max_tokens value used during testConnection probes. Anthropic Claude 4 rejects values < 64.

balanceEndpoint.description: Path of the provider's account-balance REST endpoint (e.g. '/user/balance'). When absent, balance queries are skipped for this provider.

reasoningField.description: Name of the streaming delta field that carries chain-of-thought text (e.g. 'reasoning_content' for DeepSeek). When absent, thinking callbacks are not fired.

stripInputFields.description: Field names to strip from every input message before sending. E.g. DeepSeek rejects requests that include `reasoning_content` in input.

quirks.description: Model-level quirks. Merged on top of provider-level quirks.

pricing.description: CNY per 1M tokens. Omit when pricing is unknown — UI will show usage without cost.

until.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. While Date.now() < until, the discount table replaces the base.
